title: Too Young For Love
content:
Too young for love?
    Ah, say not so!
    Tell reddening rose-buds not to blow
    Wait not for spring to pass away, - 
    Love's summer months begin with May!
    Too young for love?
    Ah, say not so!
    Too young? Too young?
    Ah, no! no! no!

    Too young for love?
    Ah, say not so,
    To practise all love learned in May.
    June soon will come with lengthened day
    While daisies bloom and tulips glow!

    Too young for love?
    Ah, say not so!
    Too young? Too young?
    Ah, no! no! no!
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Oliver Wendell Holmes delivers a powerful performance in "Too Young For Love"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
